task: Find the top posts from last year on 9GAG.
final_result_response:
Here are the **Top Posts from Last Year on 9GAG** (from [9gag.com/top/last-year](https://9gag.com/top/last-year)):

| # | Title | Upvotes | Link |
|---|-------|---------|------|
| 1 | 🔝 **THIS IS MY LAST POST! SEE YOU IN THE NEXT LIFE** | 48K | [View Post](https://9gag.com/gag/awyQBMx) |
| 2 | **Repost because it worked. I want you all to have good luck! Don't ignore!** | 42K | [View Post](https://9gag.com/gag/aPA3wpR) |
| 3 | **I'm sorry but it's true** | 42K | [View Post](https://9gag.com/gag/aPARGmV) |
| 4 | **It has started...degenerates gatheing** | 34K | [View Post](https://9gag.com/gag/aVvDBAn) |
| 5 | **I'm sorry but it's true** | 33K | [View Post](https://9gag.com/gag/aGynMA0) |

### Key Highlights:
- 🥇 **#1 Post**: *"THIS IS MY LAST POST! SEE YOU IN THE NEXT LIFE"* — a humor post featuring Goku from Dragon Ball Z with a halo, earning a whopping **48K upvotes** and **3,100+ comments**. Posted on Sep 4, 2024.
- 🥈 **#2**: A classic "lucky repost" meme about pets, grabbing **42K upvotes**.
- 🥉 **#3 & #5**: Both titled *"I'm sorry but it's true"* — two variants of the same meme format that went viral.
- **#4**: A meme about "degenerates gathering" with **34K upvotes**.

> ⚠️ *Note: 9GAG is a JavaScript-heavy infinite scroll page — only the initially loaded posts (above the fold) could be captured. These represent the absolute top-ranked posts from 2025 on the platform.*

Here are the **Top Posts from Last Year on 9GAG** (https://9gag.com/top/last-year):

1. 🥇 "THIS IS MY LAST POST! SEE YOU IN THE NEXT LIFE" — 48K upvotes | https://9gag.com/gag/awyQBMx
   - A humor post featuring Goku from Dragon Ball Z with a halo. Posted Sep 4, 2024. Had 3,100+ comments.

2. 🥈 "Repost because it worked. I want you all to have good luck! Don't ignore!" — 42K upvotes | https://9gag.com/gag/aPA3wpR
   - Classic viral lucky repost meme in the Animals & Pets category.

3. 🥉 "I'm sorry but it's true" — 42K upvotes | https://9gag.com/gag/aPARGmV

4. "It has started...degenerates gatheing" — 34K upvotes | https://9gag.com/gag/aVvDBAn

5. "I'm sorry but it's true" (variant) — 33K upvotes | https://9gag.com/gag/aGynMA0

These were retrieved by navigating to https://9gag.com/top, then clicking the "Last Year" time filter. The #1 post with 48K upvotes was the clear winner for the year.

judge.reasoning:
**Task Understanding:** The user wanted to find the top posts from last year on 9GAG. A successful completion would involve navigating to 9GAG, applying a "Last Year" time filter, and returning the top-ranked posts with relevant details (titles, upvotes, links).

**Output Assessment:** The agent provided a table of 5 top posts from 9GAG's "Last Year" section with titles, upvote counts (ranging from 33K–48K), and direct post URLs. The #1 post was "THIS IS MY LAST POST! SEE YOU IN THE NEXT LIFE" with 48K upvotes.

**Evidence:** Step 10 (browser_analyze_state) shows the agent visually confirmed it was on the correct page with visible posts including the #1 post (Goku/Dragon Ball Z humor post, 48K upvotes). Steps 11 and 12 both show the same 5 posts extracted programmatically via JavaScript from article elements, with consistent upvote counts and URLs. The agent navigated to 9GAG (Step 0), clicked "Top" (Step 2), and clicked "Last Year" (Step 4), confirming the correct filter was applied. The execution integrity status is "healthy" with no browser errors.

**Summary:** The agent successfully navigated to 9GAG, applied the "Top > Last Year" filter, and extracted 5 top posts with titles, upvote counts, and direct links — all corroborated by both visual analysis and programmatic extraction steps.
